skill-architecture-mother-normalizer.notes: Zero runtime deps beyond next/react. No app/api/*. output:standalone. basePath by NODE_ENV. No infra hardcode in code (port/URL via config.ts + env). No business calc in front (showcase is static by design).

skill-frontend-normalization.notes: App Router, client boundaries correct, next/font for all 4 fonts, no portals, no getAnimations, performance.now timing.

blockers: fillArea gate (skill 6.7) fails massively below 1440x800: desktop 1280x620 fails slides 02/04/09/19/20; 1280x560 many; mobile 390x740 and 390x667 nearly all slides 0.37-0.65
viewport-fit: cover absent in layout.tsx (skill 6.6) - safe-area-inset inert on notched iPhones
scripts/audit-fit.mjs missing as named; fit-harness.mjs measures HEIGHT fill with non-blocking 0.65, not AREA fill with blocking 0.75/0.70; no scale or minFont gates
narration/slidePlan.ts (skill 6.0 schema) absent - nPlan strings do not match SlidePlan type

passes: chrome complete and canonical (logo, slide-head, dock order Sair-PDF-lang-Aa-audio, nav 44x44 bottom-left, counter bottom-right, progress top, slide-foot legal)
scroll-snap x mandatory engine, frame-aware Esc/Sair
LANGS order BR-PT-EN default BR, single-source readingText

SlideFrame UPCAP=1.0, F25 height-auto measuring, scrollWidth/Height
no emoji (MedIcon SVGs), no F11/F20 violations, no floating button
favicon trio deck-specific emerald #10b981, tab title = DiscoveryHealth

skill-node-quality.notes: tsc --noEmit clean, zero any, no console.log in prod paths, no Math.random for business data. FAIL item: no ESLint/Prettier config in repo.

skill-dependency-governance.notes: next 15.5.15 has 13 advisories incl. 1 HIGH (middleware auth bypass, cache poisoning, DoS) - fix = next@15.5.19. 1 moderate (postcss). Lockfile present, versions pinned.

skill-codebase-sanitizer.notes: No dead exports of note; DhTw is a documented compatibility shim (commented); no orphan components.

legacy-killer.notes: tsconfig.tsbuildinfo is TRACKED in git and modified (build artifact in VCS); missing from .gitignore.

skill-playwright-massive-tester.notes: Repo fit harness executed against real production build (26 slides x 6 viewports). Cut gate PASS everywhere (max -12px). Fill: 70 cases below even the lenient 0.65 height threshold; vs skill area gate (0.75/0.70) only 1440x800 truly passes. Harness itself is v1 (height-based, non-blocking fill).

skill-normalize-identifiers.notes: Light-touch check: slide ids sequential ints, scene steps zero-padded strings, mp3 naming slide-NN consistent across 3 locales (1..25). Only gap: 26th slide has no narration id.

blockers: showcase 6.7 fillArea gate fails on 5 of 6 canonical viewports (mobile near-total)

Upgrade fit harness to area-based blocking gates and wire as audit:fit npm script
Add slidePlan.ts per 6.0; add narration/reading for closing slide
